title: Runtime Checkpoint
description: Schema for the runtime checkpoint file (.runtime/checkpoint.json) that tracks execution progress across the store-os workflow chain. This schema is used by the Phase 11 runtime layer to enable resumability. It is NOT a planning artifact schema — it is operational state metadata.

schema_version.description: Version of the checkpoint schema. Must be '1.0' for Phase 11 initial implementation.

project_id.description: Project identifier. Must match the project folder name and the project_id field in all planning artifacts.

execution_run_id.description: Unique identifier for this execution run. Format: run-{YYYYMMDD}-{HHMMSS}. Used to correlate checkpoint with execution log entries.

chain_start_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the execution chain started (when resolve-runtime-config began).

last_updated_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the checkpoint was last written. Updated after each workflow completes or fails.

chain_status.description: Current overall status of the execution chain.

completed_workflows.description: Ordered list of workflows that have completed successfully in this run. Only SUCCESS entries are included here.

workflow_id.description: The workflow identifier matching the id field in the workflow draft JSON.

completed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when this workflow completed successfully.

output_artifact.description: The primary artifact file name produced by this workflow. Null if the workflow produced no artifact file (e.g., resolve-runtime-config, intake-store-input).

status.description: Always SUCCESS for completed workflows. Failed workflows are recorded in failed_at, not here.

failed_at.description: Details of the workflow that caused a HALT. Null if chain_status is not HALTED.

workflow_id.description: The workflow_id of the workflow that failed.

failed_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the failure occurred.

error_code.description: The error category code from the error taxonomy.

output_artifact.description: Always null for failed workflows — no artifact was successfully written.

retry_count.description: Number of retries attempted before the halt. 0 if no retries were allowed for this error type.

next_workflow.description: The workflow_id of the next workflow to execute. Null when chain_status is COMPLETE. Set to the workflow to re-run when chain_status is HALTED.

review_gate_status.description: Status of the manual review gate. The gate is the pause point after all Phase 1-9 artifacts are produced when manual_review_required is true.

review_gate_approved_at.description: ISO 8601 datetime when the review gate was approved. Null if not yet approved.

env.description: The STORE_OS_ENV value at the time of chain start.

llm_model_used.description: The STORE_OS_LLM_MODEL value at chain start. Records which LLM model was used for audit and reproducibility.

shopify_api_version_used.description: The STORE_OS_SHOPIFY_API_VERSION value at chain start.

notes.description: Human-readable notes appended during the run. May be empty. Used for non-error observations.
